body.title: D327/D329: Inference encapsulation — 3 files replace 6+
body.result: All 4 phases complete. inference_ollama.py + inference_openrouter.py canonical. anthropic.py deleted (D329). 100+ model refs swept. 1875 tests pass.
body.description: Create inference_gateway.py, inference_ollama.py, inference_openrouter.py. Migrate from reasoners/base.py, openrouter_reasoner.py, anthropic.py, cluster_router.py, relay.py. Delete anthropic.py (D329 tier.5 dead). Strip 100+ model name refs from main.py, server.py, seeds. machine_manager stays as dumb comms.
